_meta.purpose: Demo brief — Alpine Harvest Organic Trail Mix, US West market. One CPG brand × 4 regional variants demonstrating the exercise's regional packaging automation scenario.
_meta.data_origin: Created for Phase A/B final wrap-up. Brand 'Alpine Harvest', product 'Organic Trail Mix' chosen as a clean, IP-free CPG example.

cultural_context: Pacific Northwest outdoor lifestyle. Warm neutral earth tones — tan, forest green, aged cedar. Imagery of mountain trails, pine cones, and Pacific coastal foliage. Approachable and honest brand voice.

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: Classic Pacific Northwest blend of almonds, cashews, dried cranberries, and pumpkin seeds for sustained trail energy

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: Pacific Northwest trail mix elevated with fair-trade dark chocolate chips, walnuts, and tart dried cherries

audience: outdoor enthusiasts and health-conscious adults 25-45 in the Pacific Northwest
